data.name: gridTongHop_DesignTimeLayout.LayoutString
data.value: <GridEXLayoutData><RootTable><GroupTotals>ExpandedGroup</GroupTotals><Columns Collection="true" ElementName="Column"><Column0 ID="CanBoNongVu"><AggregateFunction>Count</AggregateFunction><Caption>Cán Bộ Nông Vụ</Caption><DataMember>CanBoNongVu</DataMember><Key>CanBoNongVu</Key><Position>0</Position><Width>115</Width></Column0><Column1 ID="TenXa"><Caption>Tên xã</Caption><DataMember>TenXa</DataMember><Key>TenXa</Key><Position>1</Position></Column1><Column2 ID="TenThon"><Caption>Tên thôn</Caption><DataMember>TenThon</DataMember><Key>TenThon</Key><Position>2</Position></Column2><Column3 ID="SoPhieu"><Caption>Số Phiếu</Caption><DataMember>SoPhieu</DataMember><Key>SoPhieu</Key><Position>3</Position><Width>81</Width></Column3><Column4 ID="NgayNhan"><Caption>Ngày Cấp</Caption><DataMember>NgayNhan</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><FormatString>dd/MM/yyyy</FormatString><Key>NgayNhan</Key><Position>4</Position></Column4><Column5 ID="MaHopDong"><Caption>Mã hơp đồng</Caption><DataMember>MaHopDong</DataMember><Key>MaHopDong</Key><Position>5</Position></Column5><Column6 ID="HoTen"><Caption>Chủ hợp đồng</Caption><DataMember>HoTen</DataMember><Key>HoTen</Key><Position>6</Position></Column6><Column7 ID="VatTu"><Caption>Vật tư</Caption><DataMember>VatTu</DataMember><Key>VatTu</Key><Position>7</Position></Column7><Column8 ID="SoLuongThuc"><AggregateFunction>Sum</AggregateFunction><Caption>Số lượng cấp</Caption><DataMember>SoLuongThuc</DataMember><Key>SoLuongThuc</Key><Position>8</Position></Column8><Column9 ID="DonGia"><Caption>Đơn Giá</Caption><DataMember>DonGia</DataMember><Key>DonGia</Key><Position>9</Position></Column9><Column10 ID="SoTien"><AggregateFunction>Sum</AggregateFunction><Caption>Số tiền</Caption><DataMember>SoTien</DataMember><Key>SoTien</Key><Position>10</Position></Column10><Column11 ID="SoXe"><Caption>Xe vận Chuyển</Caption><DataMember>SoXe</DataMember><Key>SoXe</Key><Position>11</Position></Column11><Column12 ID="TenLaiXe"><Caption>Tên lái xe</Caption><DataMember>TenLaiXe</DataMember><Key>TenLaiXe</Key><Position>12</Position><Width>121</Width></Column12><Column13 ID="DonGiaVanChuyen"><Caption>Đơn giá vận chuyển</Caption><DataMember>DonGiaVanChuyen</DataMember><Key>DonGiaVanChuyen</Key><Position>13</Position></Column13><Column14 ID="TienVanChuyen"><Caption>Tiền vận ID="SortKey0"><ColIndex>1</ColIndex></SortKey0></SortKeys><AllowDelete>False</AllowDelete><ColumnHeaders>True</ColumnHeaders><ColumnSetHeaders>True</ColumnSetHeaders><GroupCondition
